news.t: Grayscale Launches Grayscale® Bitcoin Covered Call ETF (Ticker: BTCC) and Grayscale® Bitcoin Premium Income ETF (Ticker: BPI)

overview.description: The Grayscale Bitcoin Premium Income ETF (BPI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long btc, short usd currency. The fund is actively managed, seeking current income through a synthetic covered call strategy on Bitcoin ETPs by investing in options rather than directly in Bitcoin. The fund aims for capital appreciation while providing monthly distributions to investors BPI was launched on Apr 2, 2025 and is issued by Grayscale.

data.title: Grayscale Launches Grayscale® Bitcoin Covered Call ETF (Ticker: BTCC) and Grayscale® Bitcoin Premium Income ETF (Ticker: BPI)
data.text: STAMFORD, Conn., April 02, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Grayscale, a leading crypto asset manager, today announced the launch of Grayscale® Bitcoin Covered Call ETF (Ticker: BTCC) and Grayscale® Bitcoin P...
